page.title.description: H1 heading on the Resume page.
page.title.notes: Use the most natural term for a professional CV in the target language.

page.linkedinText.description: Link text for the LinkedIn profile link on the Resume page.

page.linkedinAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the LinkedIn link on the Resume page.
page.linkedinAriaLabel.notes: Must indicate it opens in a new tab.

summary.heading.description: Section heading for the professional summary.

summary.body.description: The professional summary paragraph — a brief narrative about the portfolio owner's strengths.
summary.body.notes: Written in first person. Emphasizes leadership, problem-solving, and communication across diverse audiences.

experience.heading.description: Section heading for the work experience list.

experience.virbela.title.description: Job title for the Virbela role.
experience.virbela.title.notes: Translate the title; the company name Virbela must not be translated.

experience.virbela.location.description: Work location for the Virbela role.
experience.virbela.location.notes: Translate 'Remote' naturally into the target language.

experience.virbela.bullet_1.description: First achievement bullet for Lead PM role at Virbela.
experience.virbela.bullet_1.notes: Preserve '40+' exactly. Do not translate Virbela.

experience.virbela.bullet_2.description: Second achievement bullet for Lead PM role at Virbela.

experience.virbela.bullet_3.description: Third achievement bullet for Lead PM role at Virbela.

experience.virbela.bullet_4.description: Fourth achievement bullet for Lead PM role at Virbela.
experience.virbela.bullet_4.notes: OKR is an acronym — do not translate. Preserve as 'OKR' or 'OKRs'.

experience.virbela.bullet_5.description: Fifth achievement bullet for Lead PM role at Virbela.

experience.virbela.bullet_6.description: Sixth achievement bullet for Lead PM role at Virbela.

experience.virbela.bullet_7.description: Seventh achievement bullet for Lead PM role at Virbela.

experience.project44.title.description: Job title for the project44 role.
experience.project44.title.notes: project44 has an intentional lowercase 'p' — preserve exactly.

experience.project44.location.description: Work location for the project44 role.

experience.project44.bullet_1.description: First achievement bullet for PM role at project44.
experience.project44.bullet_1.notes: Fortune 500 is a proper noun — keep as-is.

experience.project44.bullet_2.description: Second achievement bullet for PM role at project44.
experience.project44.bullet_2.notes: Preserve '40%' exactly. EDI and API are acronyms — do not translate.

experience.omnitracs.location.description: Work location for the Omnitracs roles.
experience.omnitracs.location.notes: Translate 'Various' naturally — meaning multiple office locations.

experience.omnitracs.role_1.title.description: Job title for the first Omnitracs role (Strategic Initiatives).
experience.omnitracs.role_1.title.notes: SaaS is an acronym — do not expand or translate.

experience.omnitracs.role_1.bullet_1.description: First bullet for Omnitracs Strategic Initiatives role.

experience.omnitracs.role_1.bullet_2.description: Second bullet for Omnitracs Strategic Initiatives role.
experience.omnitracs.role_1.bullet_2.notes: Preserve '$2M' exactly — currency format must not change.

experience.omnitracs.role_1.bullet_3.description: Third bullet for Omnitracs Strategic Initiatives role.

experience.omnitracs.role_2.title.description: Job title for the second Omnitracs role (Canadian Market).

experience.omnitracs.role_2.bullet_1.description: First bullet for Omnitracs Canadian Market role.
experience.omnitracs.role_2.bullet_1.notes: ELD is a regulatory acronym — do not translate.

experience.omnitracs.role_2.bullet_2.description: Second bullet for Omnitracs Canadian Market role.
experience.omnitracs.role_2.bullet_2.notes: Preserve '18%' exactly. ARR and YoY are finance acronyms — do not translate.

experience.omnitracs.role_2.bullet_3.description: Third bullet for Omnitracs Canadian Market role.

experience.omnitracs.role_3.title.description: Job title for the third Omnitracs role (Product Manager).

experience.omnitracs.role_3.bullet_1.description: First bullet for Omnitracs Product Manager role.

experience.omnitracs.role_3.bullet_2.description: Second bullet for Omnitracs Product Manager role.

experience.omnitracs.role_3.bullet_3.description: Third bullet for Omnitracs Product Manager role.
experience.omnitracs.role_3.bullet_3.notes: PRD and QA are product management acronyms — do not translate.

experience.crossmark.location.description: Work location for the CROSSMARK roles.

experience.crossmark.role_1.title.description: Job title for the first CROSSMARK role (Product Owner / Business Analyst).

experience.crossmark.role_1.bullet_1.description: First bullet for CROSSMARK Product Owner role.
experience.crossmark.role_1.bullet_1.notes: Preserve '3,000+' exactly. CROSSMARK must appear in all-caps.

experience.crossmark.role_1.bullet_2.description: Second bullet for CROSSMARK Product Owner role.

experience.crossmark.role_1.bullet_3.description: Third bullet for CROSSMARK Product Owner role.
experience.crossmark.role_1.bullet_3.notes: Agile/Scrum refers to the software development methodology — translate the surrounding text but the methodology names may be kept.

experience.crossmark.role_2.title.description: Job title for the second CROSSMARK role (Management Trainee).

experience.crossmark.role_2.bullet_1.description: First bullet for CROSSMARK Management Trainee role.

experience.crossmark.role_2.bullet_2.description: Second bullet for CROSSMARK Management Trainee role.
experience.crossmark.role_2.bullet_2.notes: CPG is an industry acronym — do not translate.
